## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style conventions in the touched directories

- [ ] Documentation updated where behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] No large binary artefacts (use Git LFS or external hosting if needed)
